summary: Tested Impact Dashboard features: All backend API endpoints (21/21 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Features tested: Impact score tracking, verified causes (8 seeded), Grom/surfer search, donation settings, public impact score with levels (Starter→Legend), and instant shaka videos.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/impact/dashboard/{user_id} correctly returns full dashboard with credits, sponsorships, settings
GET /api/impact/public/{user_id} correctly returns public impact score with level calculation
GET /api/impact/causes correctly returns 8 verified causes with category filtering
GET /api/impact/search-groms returns Groms to support with location search
GET /api/impact/search-surfers returns competitive surfers (Comp Surfer, Pro roles)
PUT /api/impact/settings/{user_id} correctly validates grom ID and cause names
Impact level calculation: Starter(0) → Contributor(100) → Supporter(500) → Patron(1000) → Hero(2500) → Champion(5000) → Legend(10000)
Sidebar correctly shows Impact link only for photographer roles
Earnings destination UI correctly hidden for non-Hobbyist photographers
seed_data_creation: 8 verified causes seeded: Surfrider Foundation, Sustainable Surf, Waves for Water, Stoked Mentoring, Jimmy Miller Memorial Foundation, Life Rolls On, Surf Bus Foundation, Oceana
context_for_next_testing_agent: Impact Dashboard fully implemented and tested. Key verified flows: 1) GET /api/impact/dashboard/{user_id} returns full dashboard data 2) GET /api/impact/public/{user_id} returns public impact score with level 3) GET /api/impact/causes returns 8 verified causes with filtering 4) GET /api/impact/search-groms returns Groms 5) GET /api/impact/search-surfers returns competitive surfers 6) PUT /api/impact/settings/{user_id} updates donation destination 7) POST /api/impact/instant-shaka validates sponsorship 8) GET /api/impact/instant-shakas returns videos. Frontend: Impact Dashboard page (/impact) shows level, stats, causes tab, groms tab, settings tab. Profile page shows Impact tab for photographers. Sidebar shows Impact link for photographer roles.

frontend: Impact Level card shows Starter with emoji (PASSED)
Stats cards: Groms Supported, Causes Supported, Sponsorships Given, Withdrawable (PASSED)
Overview tab shows Current Impact Destination and Recent Impact (PASSED)
Causes tab shows 8 verified causes with categories (PASSED)
Settings tab shows donation destination and split slider (PASSED)
Sidebar shows Impact link highlighted for photographers (PASSED)
Profile page shows Impact tab for photographers (PASSED)
Profile Impact tab shows level, credits given, groms/causes supported (PASSED)
View Impact Dashboard button visible on Profile Impact tab (PASSED)
Session Settings modal shows surf spot selector (PASSED)
Earnings destination selector correctly hidden for non-Hobbyist (PASSED)

mocked_api_note: None - all Impact Dashboard features fully implemented
